milk-blooming-bunny.name: Milk: Blooming Bunny

findings: 0.70 COLD: F3 dead block — burst pierceDamagePct 117.64 never fires (no hasPierce; modeled!=working) + auto-mode too pessimistic (real procs Embarrassment partially). Fix hasPierce. F5: the old 'poor auto-play' 0.70 DECISION rationale is DIRECTION-SUSPECT (predates ratio-direction fix — poor auto = HOT sim, but she's COLD)

milk-blooming-bunny.residual: ~0.7 is an ACCEPTED DECISION (poor auto-play) — validated-by-decision, not tuned to 1.0

skill1: ■ Activates when performing a Full Charge attack. Affects self.
skill2: ■ Activates only when in Embarrassment status. Affects self.
burst: Gains Immunity to Embarrassment for 10 sec.

caveats: burst: unparsed effect "Gains Immunity to Embarrassment for 10 sec."
